ruleset.name: orchestrator-pmd
ruleset.description:
Production PMD baseline for the observability benchmarking orchestrator. Formatting is handled by Spotless/google-java-format. Security bug patterns are handled by SpotBugs + FindSecBugs. This ruleset focuses on maintainability, correctness, duplication, naming conventions, and the public API Javadoc baseline.
Exact Javadoc-tag completeness for documented public methods, documented public records, record canonical constructors, and public constants is checked separately by quality/CompactConstructorJavadocParamCheck.java during validate because PMD 7's built-in XML-configurable documentation rules do not expose Javadoc tag completeness.

rule.name: UnusedInjectedField
rule.message: Injected field is never used; remove the field or use constructor injection only for collaborators that the class actually uses.
rule.description: PMD's built-in UnusedPrivateField rule intentionally ignores package-private fields. CDI-managed production classes sometimes declare package-private @Inject fields, so this rule catches injected collaborators that are declared but never referenced by the class.

property.name: xpath

rule.name: AvoidOnDemandImports
rule.message: Avoid wildcard imports; import the required types or members explicitly.
rule.description: Avoid on-demand imports in production code because they hide direct dependencies and can mask unused imports during maintenance.
